tips: Use JSON.parse() with try/catch to safely handle malformed data
JSON.stringify accepts a replacer function to filter or transform values
The space parameter in JSON.stringify pretty-prints output: JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2)
Use toJSON() methods on objects to customize serialization
JSON keys must be double-quoted — single quotes are invalid
Trailing commas are not allowed in JSON
Use JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj)) for a shallow clone of plain objects
Bun can import .json files directly: import data from './config.json'
JSON schema (JSON Schema) validates structure and types of JSON documents
Use reviver functions in JSON.parse to transform values during parsing
